hotel_name: Khách sạn Sheraton Sài Gòn Grand Opera (Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel)

reviews.title: Superb but over-priced
reviews.positives: Room cleanliness, great location, fast internet

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The main tower twin beds and the swimming pool area
reviews.negatives: The executive tower rooms are dated.

reviews.title: Nice location
reviews.positives: prompt service, good food, accomodating staff

reviews.title: Comfortable but painful foods.
reviews.positives: Not interested
reviews.negatives: I got locked in WASHROOM as LOCK was in default.

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text: We were a little bit disappointed. We thought we checked in 5 stars to get 5 starts service. The checked in took longer then 5 minutes. The room doesnt come with free internet. Breakfast was for 1 person. For the price that we paid, we could stay at a 3 star hotel and get better service and facilities.
reviews.positives: Nice bed, pillows and clean

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives:
Rooms that were sold online were not available upon check in.Process to check in was too slow for the 5 star hotel property standard.Also hotel rooms are in need for refurbishment.
Overal value is in central location , service and experience of a property are secondary.

reviews.title: Very cheerless and dull rooms
reviews.text: The Sheraton hotel is located in downtown HCMC, what might be one of the best locations to explore the city. The hotel lobby looks like a shopping mall, what misses some elegance because of this. The rooms are very dull and cheerless, it made me very sad to stay there for a long time. Probably the design was nice for a business hotel in the 90's but is very old fashioned nowadays. And what is it about the internet payment? The hotel is charging USD 18,00 a day for internet! This is realy very overpriced and gives me a bad feeling; it is more than 10% of the room price. You are trapped because you need it and the hotel knows you do.
reviews.positives: Great location

reviews.title: It was good
reviews.positives:
I like the location
I like staffs
I like breakfast
reviews.negatives: I don’t like the room. Its all old things and old design.

reviews.title: Poor hotel
reviews.text: Sheraton Hotel is way over priced. They charged me what amounted to 35USD for beakfast, $3.00USD for AM coffee that were watered down,18USD for very poor internet connection, etc. Room was dirty with hairs on bed, etc. Do not stay at this hotel as it is over priced and many options exist outside of Sheraton.
reviews.positives: Departure, Close to eatery/coffee shops

reviews.title: Good hotel great location snd decent value
reviews.positives: Location, nice rooms
reviews.negatives: Bathrooms are getting dated, no bidet

reviews.title: ok hotel
reviews.text: the best thing about the hotel is the location.. it is right in the center of all the attractions and shopping. It can be quite noisy even during the night. we had to change our room twice just because of the noise. the manager was quite accommodating and one night we had mosquito in the room. other than that it is a old but well kept hotel, breakfast was good as well..the only problem is to get sleep. But then that is not the hotels problem because the noise is from outside.
reviews.positives: location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Your staff was very helpful and your location fully
met our needs.

reviews.title: Poor Results
reviews.text:
From the commencement of our stay the Sheraton in HCMC was not at all a pleasant experience.  Upon arrival we had noise, hair in the bed, leaks in faucets that permitted water on the floor, etc...  Issues became worse when people were permitted to literally sleep in the hallway while making noice all evening.  The GM of the hotel was not at all in tune with the matters at hand and was more less worthless - noting he preferred to play the part of the GM by greeting guests at the front door but not providing the level of service to support guest stay.  Even the Club Level was poor - as food were presented cold with little in the way of quality as tied to raw materials.

Overall - a poor showing and I would not recommend the Sheraton HCMC to others.  Stay at other hotels instead as the GM's at these entity are not out to lunch!
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: OK - but will have to explore hotels with less stressful and safer shower stall.
reviews.positives: Staff were excellent - spoke very well, friendly - nothing was a problem. Breakfast OK ( not a breakfast person) location & room very good.
reviews.negatives:
Menu at Ground Floor Restaurant - just personal.
The non slip shower mats were  NOT GOOD. they did not stick - making showers dangerous & stressful.
The shower door opens out - result all the water on the shower door - falls on the floor outside the shower AND the bathroom ( outside the shower) becomes wet and slippery. This means after a shower I have to wipe the bathroom floor etc - bad design.

reviews.title: Very disappointong morning buffet
reviews.text: Salad smells stink.
reviews.response:
Dear Jay, 
 
On behalf of the Sheraton community, thank you for choosing us and sharing your recent experience with us. 

At Sheraton Saigon Hotel & Towers, we always strive to deliver the best quality of service, hence, your feedback is highly appreciated. Please accept our apology for your morning buffet experience. Please rest assured that our management team will take it wholeheartedly for future improvements.

Look forward to welcoming you back next time. We will take this opportunity to serve you with our best hospitality. 
 
Warmest regards,
Julian Wong
General Manager

reviews.title: Good for business stays

reviews.title: Blocking my goods in the safer
reviews.text:

They asked me to show my passport to open the safer ... and it was in it
Awful attitude

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location, close to many restaurants. Has all the major news channels.
reviews.negatives: The room rate is quite high for HCM

reviews.title: 2 Nights in Ho Chi Minh City
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located.  It is within walking distance to major attractions, shopping and restaurants.  However, having to pay S$635 for two nights is ridiculous...no breakfast and no internet access in the room.  Will not stay in Sheraton again but there are so many luxurious hotels nearby at about nearly half the price.

reviews.title: Very pleasant and comfortable. Staff accommodating and welcoming especially the guys at the pool.
reviews.positives: Roof top bar at sunset. Close to everything. Gym is wonderful.

reviews.title: Sheraton is not a real Sheraton
reviews.text:
Wifi & Breakfast is not included in Room Rate. It's not convenient.
However, I experienced a "Not Really" Sheraton in HCM city.
reviews.positives: The price is in "Very Good" rate

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Right in the central of Sai Gon

reviews.title: Seriously not impressed
reviews.text: I have made many trips to Vietnam for business and has always been impressed with the buffet served by this hotel. However, this was the first time I stayed in this hotel and probably will be my last. This hotel might be a 5 stars but the services just do not live up to my expectation. Staffs seem to be lack of enthusiasm as well. Check in time was suppose to be at 3pm and I arrived at 4pm. However, I received my room key only at 5.30pm and too make matter worst, I was being given a room next to the lift!  My family and I were staying at the club floor and naturally would expect a better service since we paid a premium. Breakfasts served in this hotel also seriously lack of choices and standard. In fact the hors d'oeuvre served at the club floor was much better than the breakfast. I guess the hotel and its staffs are too complacent. Seriously not impressed with this hotel as there are many 4 stars or even 3 stars hotels that I ever stayed and they are much better. Hardware (hotel amenities) is resonably good but the software (services) is nothing much to be desired.
reviews.positives: Centrally located

reviews.title: nice location, comfortable room and professional team
reviews.positives: staff was very friendly and supportive. true professional

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Housekeeping not very satisfactory
reviews.response:
Dear Jessica,    

Many thanks for choosing Sheraton Saigon Hotel & Towers and sharing your recent experience with us! 

We always strive to deliver a memorable stay experience for our guests but unfortunately, we were unable to meet your expectations in your recent stay with us and therefore, we wish to extend our sincere apology to you. We would appreciate if you can share with us further details via sheratonsaigon@sheraton.com. Please rest assured that our management team will take your feedbacks seriously for future improvements.  

Once again, we deeply apologize for your inconvenience. We look forward to having a chance to welcome you back so that we could serve you with our best hospitality.  

Warmest regards,  
Julian Wong  
General Manager

reviews.title: Very good experience
reviews.positives: Location is great and staff are very friendly

reviews.title: Overpriced
reviews.text: I think Sheraton is seriously overpriced even more so after the renovation of the nicer lobby and also the cafe for breakfast, there are nicer 5 stars hotel in District 1 HCM and Sheraton should reconsider your rates.  Nothing spectacular and does not have the personal feeling or touch when I was there.  No greetings smiley attendants to open door for us and no welcome drink so don't really felt it was worth the 5-stardom. For work I don't mind.

reviews.title: Amazing stay, great location and no complaints
reviews.positives: Location is perfect, walking distance to an array of shops, restaurants and bars. Good thing is, its near the night life yet not too noisy in the room. I'm so thankful for the room upgrade, I dont think I will ever experience a luxurious room like Sheraton Saigon ever again. The staff are very helpful, kind and always look out for the best for the guests.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
When I booked it was shown free wifi in your website.
When I reached there, they said that wifi free only in lobbies.
It was pure cheating.
Staff very very unprofessional
Asked for one hour late check out, declined.
I am sorry it is very poorly serviced hotel.

reviews.title: Just average the most
reviews.text: Ok at the most, the lobby looks nice but the room was small, 4 suitcases and we have no room to walk around. Staff were polite but not too friendly. For a short stay, i think its ok but i wouldn't recommend for longer stay since room was too small.
reviews.positives: Good restaurants but too expensive

reviews.title: Nice and comfortable stay
reviews.positives:
I loved the overall experience and stay at property. 
Locality was great. So many options near by. Hop-on Hop-off bus was nearby. Loads of restaurants
Breakfast was luxurious. 
Room was neat and clean. Very comfortable and spacious. Excellent service.
Staff was very courteous.
reviews.negatives: I cannot real think of anything which needs improvement.

reviews.title: horrible internet services.

Horrible internet service.   You have to pay more than $15 per day while wifi is offer free almost every where in ho chi minh city.
Old carpet smell.
reviews.positives: nothing nice here

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Nice conveniently located International hotel
reviews.text: Since we bought the hotel room through Agoda, we ordered a room plus 1 extra bed. I even emailed to Agoda reps asking how many breakfast we get for this booking and got answered the room booking including bfast means 2 people. If add 1 extra bed means another bfast included; which in total we should get 3. In reality when we talked to the hotel reps; we only got 2 bfast included. Other than that, it is perfect. Specifically love the shower room. Maybe, the lobby area and the bathrooms need renovation too.
reviews.positives: convenient standard great breakfast

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Perfect location Nice room with a partial view on the Saigon river.. Heated swimming pool (almost 40 degrees Fahrenheit or 31 degrees celsius). Gorgeous breakfast buffet including fresh coconuts.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great location
reviews.response:
Dear Huy,

It’s a genuine pleasure to have the opportunity to welcome you to stay with us at the Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel!

We are delighted to know that you had a wonderful stay experience with us, specifically highlighting your appreciation for our prime location. Your compliment is highly appreciated as a priceless motivation for our team to continuously strive to elevate our offerings and deliver memorable experiences for all our guests.

Once again, thank you for sharing your positive feedback with us. We look forward to being your home away from home whenever your travels bring you back to our charming city!

Warm regards,
Julian Wong
General Manager

reviews.title: Best location but not worth the money
reviews.text: This hotel is in the best location and has a nice swimming pool that they don’t use chemicals in the water but filter and salt instead.  My room is spacious however the air quality filter was not good.  My nose and eyes are swollen because of dust when I woke up in the morning.  The hotel had construction going on during the time I stayed.  Breakfast has many good options.  However, this hotel is renting conference rooms for companies so the breakfast room is always crowded with a lot of people.  I did not enjoy and relax during my stay here like I did at other hotels.  The hotel decoration was mediocre for 5 stars hotel.  Staffs are nice and friendly
reviews.response:
Dear Nhien, 
 
Thank you for choosing Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel for your recent stay in Ho Chi Minh City!   
 
We are delighted to hear that you appreciated our prime location, the salt-water pool, and the kindness of our associates. At the same time, we sincerely acknowledge your comments regarding the air quality in our guest room, the disturbances from construction, and the crowded breakfast area. Your feedback is invaluable to us as we strive to deliver elevated service and memorable experiences for all our guests.

Thank you once again for sharing your feedback with us. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the near future.

Warm regards,    
Julian Wong   
General Manager

reviews.title: The location is great, but there were 3-4 snack bags on the floor.
reviews.text:
The location was really good. I made a last-minute reservation for 390,000 won for one night. After checking in and entering the room, there were 3-4 snack bags lying around on the floor, so the cleaning status was poor. Since I was just going to sleep on the bed anyway, the bed was clean, so I just slept. 

The breakfast is delicious.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Confidence in the brand
reviews.text:
This was my first time stay in Sheraton. Before checking in, all I knew was that it is a five-star hotel. I was genuinely impressed by the facilities, overall experience, and location, which gave me the confidence to book Sheraton again.

Customer satisfaction is a leading indicator of purchase intention and brand advocacy. My positive experience has turned me into a returning customer wherever I travel. I will always choose Sheraton when the location is good, as location is my number one consideration in my decision-making criteria.
reviews.response:
Dear Haiyan,  
  
It’s a genuine pleasure to have the opportunity to welcome you to stay with us at the Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel!   

We are truly delighted to hear that you’ve had a memorable stay with us. Your long-lasting impression on our prime location as well as the quality of our facilities and cleanliness is well noted and appreciated. As the champion of the community, we aspire to deliver elevated stay experience and to provoke a sense of belonging for all our guests who step through our door. We are truly happy we managed to deliver that during your recent stay with us. 

Once again, thank you for sharing your great feedbacks with us. We hope to be your home away from home every time your travels bring you to our charming city.     

Warm regards,   
Julian Wong  
General Manager

reviews.title: A perfect trip combines business and leisure.
reviews.text: It is still a great place to stay if activities are centered around the old District 1. Convenient, clean, polite and quick staff. The room has a very beautiful view of Nguyen Hue central street. I will return on future occasions.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi quý khách Khang,      
     
Rất cám ơn quý khách đã tin tưởng lựa chọn khách sạn Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera và dành những lời khen ngợi về trải nghiệm vừa qua.  
  
Chúng tôi vô cùng hân hoan khi nhận được sự hài lòng của quý khách trong khoảng thời gian trải nghiệm tại khách sạn. Sự ghi nhận của quý khách về vị trí của khách sạn, sự sạch sẽ và chất lượng chỗ ở của chúng tôi cũng như phong cách phục vụ nhiệt tình, niềm nở của đội ngũ nhân viên, chính là động lực quý báu để chúng tôi luôn cố gắng mang đến chất lượng dịch vụ tốt nhất cho mỗi khách hàng khi đến với khách sạn Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera. Ngoài ra chúng tôi cũng rất vinh hạnh khi được biết quý khách có dự định sẽ quay lại khách sạn trong tương lai.  

Một lần nữa, cám ơn quý khách đã tin tưởng lựa chọn và chúng tôi mong sớm có cơ hội được đón tiếp quý khách trở lại vào một ngày gần nhất. 
     
Trân trọng,      
Julian Wong      
Tổng Giám Đốc

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location - good and center of city. Room - roomy and clean, breakfast - exceptional great
reviews.negatives: Correlation between what I have ordered from Booking.com and what Saigon Sheraton received in their database: Not consistent in information in what they received, thus one of the room out of two rooms was not reserved during my first contract (10/02 to 10/06).

reviews.title: Great Location and hotel
reviews.text: Lovely hotel in excellent location just up from Nguyen Hue street. Lovely big reception area and lobby. Clean and immaculate room with all the amenities required and hot shower. Good aircon and good soundproof rooms. Didn’t eat at hotel and ao can’t comment on the cuisine.
reviews.response:
Dear Samnang, 

It was our pleasure to welcome you to Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel.   
  
We are grateful to hear that you’ve had a memorable stay experience with us. We have also noted your stay highlights such as our prime location and the quality of our accommodations. As the champion of community, we deliver the time-honored assurance and the sense of belonging to welcome every guest who stays, dines, or has a meeting with us.  
  
Once again, thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We hope to be your home away from home every time your travels bring you to our charming city.  
  
Warm regards,    
Julian Wong   
General Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: the room was well sized, pool and sauna were great

reviews.title: Very good location
reviews.text: It is an iconic location, walkable to most places in town.
reviews.response:
Dear Poi,    
  
Thank you for choosing Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel for your recent stay in Ho Chi Minh City!  
  
We are delighted to hear that you had such a wonderful experience with us. Our goal is to create memorable moments for all our guests, and we are happy that we succeeded in doing so during your visit. That being said, we realized that we have an opportunity to improve when you return during the next visit. 
  
Thank you once again for sharing your feedback. We look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.  
  
Warm regards,    
Julian Wong   
General Manager

reviews.title: Very good stay .  Please add some Indian dishes in the breakfast

reviews.negatives: Good work by Nhu Le and Tho Truong

reviews.title: The lounge is nice.
reviews.text: At check-in, I was encouraged to use the lounge as part of a promotion. I used the lounge for breakfast, afternoon tea, and dinner. In particular, the dinner menu during the thunderstorm was great, and even though it was a promotion, $72 for two was cheap. The room was also newly renovated, which was nice. If I had to say something negative, it was that the view was just looking at buildings since it was a bit far from the river.
reviews.response:
Dear kyomi,  
 
Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotel をお選びいただき、またご感想、ご意見をご共有いただき誠にありがとうございます。  
  
当ホテルでのご滞在をお楽しみいただけたこと、心より嬉しく思います。  
当ホテルの目標は、すべてのお客様に思い出に残るご滞在をお楽しみいただくことであり、お客様にとって今回のご滞在が思い出に残るものであればと思います。  
お客様に頂きましたお褒めの言葉は大変ありがたいものであり、  
Sheraton Saigon Grand Opera Hotelでのサービスの質をより高いレベルに引き上げ続けるためのチームのモチベーションとなります。  
改めて、当ホテルでのご体験をご共有していただき、  
  
誠にありがとうございます。  
次回もお客様をお出迎えできること、心よりお待ちしております。  
  
Warm regards,     
Julian Wong    
General Manager

reviews.title: A wonderful stay @ a wonderful place
reviews.positives: Very luxurious & modern hotel, very & helpful staff, excellent restaurants @ food selection .

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I stayed for four nights. The breakfast was excellent. I opted for the club option, but the food was mediocre and mostly the same dishes. There is an all-you-can-drink option, but sparkling drinks are not displayed; you have to ask for them. The staff were kind. The location is good. Next time, I would like to stay without the club option.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text:
This is a great hotel in a prestige location. Near to restaurants, shopping and convention stores.
Bed is comfortable and room we booked is spacious.
Staff is friendly and polite 
Breakfast is very good, a variety of both Asian and western food . Have stayed here a few times and will definitely come back again.
reviews.response:
